testcase.name: Complete Hybrid MISRA Workflow › Complete Hybrid Workflow - Regular Browser to Playwright Automation
testcase.system-out:
🚀 Starting Complete Hybrid Workflow
================================================================================ 📊 AUTOMATION PROGRESS ================================================================================ 1. ⏳ Launch Browser In Progress 2. ⭕ Navigate to MISRA Pending 3. ⭕ OTP Verification Pending 4. ⭕ File Upload Pending 5. ⭕ Code Analysis Pending 6. ⭕ Download Reports Pending 7. ⭕ Verification Complete Pending ================================================================================ ⏱️ Total Time: 0.01s ================================================================================
📁 Created session directory: downloads\session-2026-05-06-10-40-11 ✅ Download session initialized: session-1778064011406-eflyv4jcf 📍 Step 1: Starting localhost server... ⏳ Waiting for server to initialize... ✅ Localhost server started successfully ✅ Server connectivity verified 📍 Step 2: Opening localhost in your default browser... ✅ Localhost opened in your default browser 🌐 URL: http://localhost:3000
================================================================================ 📊 AUTOMATION PROGRESS ================================================================================ 1. ✅ Launch Browser Completed (5.36s) 2. ⭕ Navigate to MISRA Pending 3. ⭕ OTP Verification Pending 4. ⭕ File Upload Pending 5. ⭕ Code Analysis Pending 6. ⭕ Download Reports Pending 7. ⭕ Verification Complete Pending ================================================================================ ⏱️ Total Time: 5.37s ================================================================================
📍 Step 3: Preparing browser for MISRA automation... 🔌 Connecting to your Chrome browser... Host: localhost Port: 9222 Downloads: ./downloads
╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ 🔌 PROPER BROWSER EMBEDDING - DOWNLOADS VISIBLE ║ ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
TO USE PROPER BROWSER EMBEDDING:
1. START CHROME WITH REMOTE DEBUGGING:
Windows: "C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe" \ --remote-debugging-port=9222
Mac: /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome \ --remote-debugging-port=9222
Linux: google-chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222
2. WHAT HAPPENS: ✅ Playwright connects to YOUR Chrome browser ✅ MISRA opens in YOUR browser tab ✅ Downloads appear in YOUR browser's download manager ✅ You see everything happening in real-time ✅ Downloads stay visible and accessible
3. KEY FEATURES: ✅ Same browser session ✅ Same browser tab ✅ Downloads visible in browser ✅ No separate Playwright window ✅ Professional appearance
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
⚠️ Proper browser embedding failed, falling back to separate Playwright browser 💡 Make sure Chrome is running with: --remote-debugging-port=9222 ✅ Fallback Playwright browser launched ✅ AWS Bedrock verifier initialized
🎯 Starting Complete Hybrid Workflow Test
🔵 PHASE 1: LOCALHOST IN YOUR BROWSER (MANUAL) 📋 Please complete the following in your browser: 1. Enter your Full Name, Email, and Mobile Number 2. Click "Send OTP" and wait for email from ceo@digitransolutions.in 3. Enter the 6-digit OTP and click "Verify & Login" 4. Click the "TEST" button when you see the dashboard ⏰ Waiting for you to complete registration and click TEST button... ⏳ Waiting for TEST button to be clicked in your browser... 💡 If you get "Network error", please refresh the page and try again Server: 📧 User registered: Sanjana (sanjsr125@gmail.com) Server: 🚀 TEST button clicked by Sanjana (sanjsr125@gmail.com) 🌐 MISRA will navigate in the SAME browser tab 📧 User Email: sanjsr125@gmail.com 👤 User Name: Sanjana ✅ TEST button clicked detected! ✅ User credentials fetched from localhost: - Name: Sanjana - Email: sanjsr125@gmail.com - Mobile: 9380653049
🟢 PHASE 2: MISRA AUTOMATION IN PLAYWRIGHT (AUTOMATIC) 🚀 Starting MISRA automation with your credentials...
================================================================================ 📊 AUTOMATION PROGRESS ================================================================================ 1. ✅ Launch Browser Completed (5.36s) 2. ⏳ Navigate to MISRA In Progress 3. ⭕ OTP Verification Pending 4. ⭕ File Upload Pending 5. ⭕ Code Analysis Pending 6. ⭕ Download Reports Pending 7. ⭕ Verification Complete Pending ================================================================================ ⏱️ Total Time: 62.74s ================================================================================
📍 Step 4: Opening MISRA platform in same browser session 📍 Using fallback Playwright browser ✅ Created new browser context ✅ Created new browser page 📍 Navigating to MISRA platform... ✅ MISRA platform loaded in Playwright browser 🔌 Setting up download event listener... ✅ Download listener ready ✅ Download listener configured
================================================================================ 📊 AUTOMATION PROGRESS ================================================================================ 1. ✅ Launch Browser Completed (5.36s) 2. ✅ Navigate to MISRA Completed (7.24s) 3. ⭕ OTP Verification Pending 4. ⭕ File Upload Pending 5. ⭕ Code Analysis Pending 6. ⭕ Download Reports Pending 7. ⭕ Verification Complete Pending ================================================================================ ⏱️ Total Time: 69.97s ================================================================================
